raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"advice","confidence":0.78,"matched_text":"It's always a good idea to consult with your trainer or a healthcare professional before starting any new supplement regimen.","distilled_fact":"The speaker advises consulting with a trainer or a healthcare professional before starting any new supplement regimen."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"advice","confidence":0.72,"matched_text":"They can help you determine if a pre-workout supplement is right for you and recommend a product that aligns with your goals and individual needs.","distilled_fact":"A trainer or a healthcare professional can help determine whether a pre-workout supplement is right for the user and recommend a product that aligns with the user's goals and individual needs."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"advice","confidence":0.71,"matched_text":"Remember to always read the label and use supplements as directed.","distilled_fact":"The speaker advises always reading the label and using supplements as directed."}]}
